plan_set_components: Architectural plans — floor plans (revised 160 sqm), sections, elevations, interior details
Structural plans — foundation slab on grade, perimeter grade beam, roof structure, coastal wind zone compliance
MEP coordination drawings — electrical single-line, lighting layout, plumbing isometric (pool systems removed)
Site plan — revised without pool, terrace layout, parking, landscaping setbacks
Door and window schedule — coastal-rated aluminum frames with thermal break glazing
Finish schedule — materials and finishes per coastal environment specifications
revision_notes: Executive plans reflect the redesigned 160 sqm no-pool program approved at DG-09 (second pass). All pool-related structural and MEP elements removed. Engineering package updated accordingly. 6 plan set components total — all four required engineering disciplines integrated.
